channel.title: Sound Accumulator on
channel.description: Recent content in Sound Accumulator on

item.description: 1-5 is a single released by scribble t on August 25, 2022. Artist scribble t Genre(s) Electronica, Post-classical Type single Published August 25, 2022 Bandcamp 1-5 About 1-5 was released on Bandcamp as a single without a B side in August of 2022.

1-5 is a track released by scribble t on August 25, 2022. Artist scribble t Release 1-5 Genre(s) Electronica, Post-classical Published August 25, 2022 Bandcamp 1-5 About 1-5 was performed as an improvisation on a modular synthesizer.

4-6 is a single released by scribble t on November 25, 2022. Artist scribble t Genre(s) Electronica, Post-classical Type single Published November 25, 2022 Bandcamp 4-6 About 4-6 was released on Bandcamp as a single without a B side in November of 2022.

4-6 is a track released by scribble t on November 25, 2022. Artist scribble t Release 4-6 Genre(s) Electronica, Post-classical Published November 25, 2022 Bandcamp 4-6 About 4-6 was performed as an improvisation on a modular synthesizer.

item.title: Alt-rock
item.description: Alt-rock is a genre of rock music with origins in the US and UK undergrounds of the late ’70s. AKA Alternative rock, alternative Origins 1970s US and UK Subgenre(s) About Alt-rock is a wide-ranging genre which encompasses many, many subgenres.

item.title: Buffering
item.description: Buffering is the fifth track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp Buffering Spotify Buffering About Similar tracks

item.title: Combobox
item.description: Combobox is an alt-punk band from Portland, Oregon founded by Tyler Schreiber and Zach Kay. Origin Portland, Oregon, USA Genre(s) Rock, Punk Years active 2022-present Website Combobox SoundCloud Combobox About Combobox is Zach Kay, Tyler Schreiber, Ben Headwall, and Jack Hopfinger.

item.title: Contribute
item.description: Get involved! Sound Accumulator is always looking for new submissions. Want to feature your band’s music? Want to help a local artist out?

item.title: Electronica
item.description: Electronica is a general term for a variety of electronic musical subgenres that are intended for personal listening rather than for dancing, though the term is often used ambiguously to describe most or all electronic music.

item.title: Follow the Cyborg
item.description: Follow the Cyborg is the sixth track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp Follow the Cyborg Spotify Follow the Cyborg About Similar tracks

item.title: Lain (Phone Clone)
item.description: Lain (Phone Clone) is the fourth track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp Lain (Phone Clone) Spotify Lain (Phone Clone) About Similar tracks

item.title: Like You
item.description: Like You is the eighth track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp Like You Spotify Like You About Similar tracks

item.title: Miss Grit
item.description: Miss Grit is the solo project of Margaret Sohn, a New York-based musician. AKA Margaret Sohn Origin New York, New York, USA Genre(s) Alt-rock Years active 2018-present Website Miss Grit Bandcamp Miss Grit Spotify Miss Grit SoundCloud Miss Grit About Miss Grit produces deeply introspective alt-rock that often harkens to the noise and genre fusion of St.

item.title: Nothing's Wrong
item.description: Nothing’s Wrong is the third track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp Nothing’s Wrong Spotify Nothing’s Wrong About Similar tracks

item.title: Perfect Blue
item.description: Perfect Blue is the first track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp Perfect Blue Spotify Perfect Blue About Similar tracks

item.title: Post-classical
item.description: Post-classical is a genre of music that experiments with classical music’s sonorities within the context of electronic music. AKA Ambient Origins 1940s France Subgenre(s) About Post-classical music has its origins in the experimental recordings of French composers such as Pierre Schaeffer, as well as the “furniture music” of Erik Satie.

item.title: Punk
item.description: Punk is a music genre and subculture that was originally rooted in the garage rock movement of the ’60s. AKA Punk rock Origins 1970s US, UK, and Australia Subgenre(s) About Traditional punk is usually defined by its aggressive vocal style, short & up-tempo songs, crunchy guitar sounds, DIY aesthetic, and anti-establishment themes.

item.title: Rock
item.description: Rock (originally, “rock and roll”) is a genre of music that was pioneered in the ’40s and early ’50s by musicians that borrowed from & electrified blues, folk, and other popular musics of the time.

item.title: scribble t
item.description: scribble t is the solo project of guitarist and synthesist Tyler Schreiber. AKA Tyler Schreiber Origin Portland, Oregon, USA Genre(s) Electronica, Post-classical Years active 2022-present Website Tyler Schreiber Bandcamp scribble t About scribble t is a project born out of Tyler Schreiber’s developing fascination with hardware synthesis techniques.

item.title: Syncing
item.description: Syncing is the tenth and final track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp Syncing Spotify Syncing About Similar tracks

item.title: The End
item.description: The End is the ninth track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp The End Spotify The End About Similar tracks

item.title: Trip hop
item.description: Trip hop is a fusion music genre that originated in the UK in the 1990s. AKA Downtempo Origins 1990s UK Subgenre(s) About Trip hop pulls from a variety of genres to produce an atmospheric, psychedelic soup of slow-motion sound.

item.title: Your Eyes Are Mine
item.description: Your Eyes Are Mine is the second track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp Your Eyes Are Mine Spotify Your Eyes Are Mine About Similar tracks

item.title: 사이보그를 따라와
item.description: 사이보그를 따라와 is the seventh track on Miss Grit’s debut album Follow the Cyborg. Artist Miss Grit Release Follow the Cyborg Genre(s) Alt-rock Published February 24, 2023 Bandcamp 사이보그를 따라와 Spotify 사이보그를 따라와 About Similar tracks
